extortion.description: Comercial Automotriz de los Altos S.A. de C.V. is a Mexican small/medium-sized company operating in the automotive and tire sector. It specializes in: The sale of tires and auto parts Mechanical services and maintenance Retail sales and spare parts for vehicles It operates in several states, including Jalisco, Michoacán, and Aguascalientes, within the Los Altos region of Mexico.
